description: Microsoft is an American multinational technology company that produces software, personal computers, and services. It is one of the world's largest and most influential technology companies
vision_statement: Empower every person and organization on the planet to achieve more.
mission_statement: To help people and businesses throughout the world realize their full potential.
core_values: Integrity is the basis for everything we do
We are accountable for our actions
We are passionate about our customers
We are committed to our people
We are accountable for our actions
We are passionate about our customers
We are committed to our people
sales_motion: Microsoft's sales motion is focused on providing a comprehensive set of solutions to meet the evolving needs of its customers, including cloud computing, artificial intelligence, and cybersecurity.
exit_strategy_history: Microsoft's exit strategy history includes the sale of its MSN Direct business to Garmin in 2008
The sale of its Danger Inc. business to Microsoft in 2008
ethical_sourcing: Microsoft has a strong commitment to ethical sourcing and has implemented various initiatives to ensure responsible sourcing practices, including the Microsoft Supplier Code of Conduct.

case_studies.title: Microsoft Azure Case Study
case_studies.description: Microsoft Azure helped a leading financial services company reduce costs and improve scalability.

case_studies.title: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Case Study
case_studies.description: Microsoft Dynamics 365 helped a leading manufacturing company improve customer engagement and sales.

sustainability_csr: Microsoft has a strong commitment to sustainability and has implemented various initiatives to reduce its environmental impact, including the Microsoft Sustainability Calculator.
crisis_behavior: Microsoft has a well-established crisis management process in place, which includes regular scenario planning and communication with stakeholders.
